name: Speedy Local
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on Speedylocal with Synup
tags: india; uae; australia; new-zealand; canada; united-kingdom-gb; united-states-us
detailed_paragraph:
Speedy Local + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Speedy Local with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Speedy Local?

Speedy Local is likely an online directory or platform that offers efficient and quick access to local business listings and services. It may focus on providing users with fast and convenient ways to find businesses and services in their vicinity.

Why Speedy Local + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on Speedy Local, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to Speedy Local through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on Speedy Local.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Speedy Local, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate Speedy Local + Synup?

The Speedy Local integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Speedy Local integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Speedy Local logo to manage the Synup + Speedy Local integration and associated settings.
